title: cyathea parianensis
intro: Cyathea parianensis, also known as the Philippine tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to the Philippines. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyathea parianensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Cyathea parianensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can also be used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
